name: workshop
description: Persistent workshop directory protocol for AI coding sessions — session entry, scenario triggers, write gate, and exit ritual

interface.shortDescription: Persistent workshop directory for AI coding sessions
interface.longDescription: Workshop gives your AI assistant a persistent workbench across sessions — a directory convention plus a protocol for session entry, scenario-based triggers, strict write gating, and exit ritual. The next session knows what you were doing, why, and what to do next.
defaultPrompt: What were we working on last session?
Pick up the thread from workshop/board.md and continue.
